description: The project is nearing completion. The PM must formally request the final inspection from the city's building department to obtain the Certificate of Occupancy.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all other required inspections (plumbing, electrical, mechanical, fire) have passed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all prerequisite inspections are complete and passed.

nodes.task_description: Submit a 'Final Inspection Request' through the city's online portal.
